name: breather
description: The brake pedal your AI coding setup is missing. Tracks how long you've been going, nudges you to take breaks, and saves your context so stopping doesn't cost you 20 minutes of 'where was I?'

show_prompt_count.title: Show prompt count
show_prompt_count.description: Show prompt count in the status line

show_velocity.title: Show velocity
show_velocity.description: Show prompts-per-minute rate in the status line

show_break_count.title: Show break count
show_break_count.description: Show break count in the status line (default: true)
